texto: Part of me wanted to disappear into a cave in India, and I did end up going on retreats there, but, don't ask me why, I always felt very strongly that the point for me was to find a way to live a truly spiritual life in the modern day world and be able to work with all the positive aspects of our cultural and technological advancements.
explicacao: Citação de Linus Roache sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Part of me wanted to disappear into a cave in India, and I did end up going on retreats there, bu…” articula vida, work, day em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
